name: @fraczak/k
description: k — a language for composing first-order partial functions over algebraic data types (products and tagged unions); includes runtime, type derivation, REPL, and codec toolchain

scripts.prepare: jiwson -m es6 parser.jison -o parser.mjs; jiwson -m es6 valueParser.jison -o valueParser.mjs;
scripts.test: node test.mjs; for f in Code-derivation-tests/*.mjs; do echo $f; node $f; done; node test-fingerprint.mjs; node test-hash-fuzz.mjs; node test-hash-normalization.mjs; node test-k-object.mjs; node test-repl2.mjs; ./tests.sh

author: Wojciech Fraczak
